title: Indulgent German Cabbage Casserole
description: This jammy, crisp German-inspired casserole blends creamy coconut milk with apple jam for a show-off vegetarian dish.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat, add sliced onion and sauté until translucent and slightly caramelized, about 6-7 minutes.
Add apple slices and continue cooking until they soften, about 3-4 minutes.
Stir in apple jam and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
In a small bowl, whisk together coconut milk, miso paste, soy sauce, and vegetable stock until smooth.
Transfer onion-apple mixture to a casserole dish, scatter shredded cabbage on top, and pour the sauce evenly over everything.
Sprinkle salt and black pepper over the casserole and cover loosely with foil.
Bake in the preheated oven for 30 minutes until the cabbage is tender and the sauce has thickened.
While the casserole bakes, toast breadcrumbs in a dry skillet over medium heat until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes, stirring frequently.
Remove the casserole from the oven, sprinkle toasted breadcrumbs over the top, and bake uncovered for an additional 5 minutes until the topping is crisp.
